title: Full LiveView + channels + sandbox wiring audit
prompt: Write `docs/full_sandbox_wiring_audit.md` describing the complete set of files and changes required to make a NEW Phoenix project support LiveView and channel tests with Ecto sandbox. Must list all 7 files with a one-line change description each: (1) `config/test.exs` — sql_sandbox config, (2) `endpoint.ex` — plug at top, (3) `endpoint.ex` — connect_info for LV socket with :user_agent, (4) `endpoint.ex` — connect_info for channel socket with :user_agent, (5) `user_socket.ex` — decode metadata into assigns, (6) `user_auth.ex` (or equivalent) — on_mount sandbox hook, (7) `router.ex` — live_session on_mount ordering. List all 7.
tier_rationale: Comprehensive wiring audit — must name all 7 touchpoints.
